questions.question: What is the result of "Hello" + " " + "World"?
questions.explanation: The + operator concatenates (joins) strings. "Hello" + " " + "World" gives "Hello World".

questions.question: What does len("Python") return?
questions.explanation: len() counts all characters including spaces. "Python" has 6 letters.

questions.question: What does "python".upper() return?
questions.explanation: .upper() converts every character in the string to uppercase.

questions.question: What does "Hello World"[6] return?
questions.explanation: Indexing starts at 0: H(0) e(1) l(2) l(3) o(4) space(5) W(6). So [6] is "W".

questions.question: The string method ______ removes whitespace from the beginning and end of a string.
What does "Ha" * 3 evaluate to?
questions.explanation: The * operator repeats the string. "Ha" repeated 3 times is "HaHaHa".
